stemHtml: Which statement about the interrogation by the DME-interrogator is correct?

options.a: The interrogation starts directly after the correct DME-frequency has been selected on the frequency-selecting-panel by the pilot.
options.b: The interrogation can only take place if the Echo Protection Circuit has been locked.
options.c: The interrogation starts when the interrogator has been warmed up sufficiently, whether pulse-pairs are received or not.
options.d: The interrogation does not start before pulse-pairs of the tuned DME-station are received.
